text: I love Spotify but discovering new music is really hard. The recommendations keep showing me the same artists and I never find anything fresh unless a friend sends me a link.
author: user_a1b2c3d4

text: Discover Weekly used to be amazing. Now it feels repetitive and the algorithm ignores what I skip. I want better discovery for indie and underground music.
author: user_e5f6g7h8

text: I mostly replay the same playlists when I study. I wish Spotify helped me branch out without ruining my focus playlists with random genres.
author: user_i9j0k1l2

text: Search is terrible for finding new songs. I type an mood or vibe and get popular hits I already know. Discovery feels broken compared to other apps.
author: user_m3n4o5p6

text: As a casual listener I just want a simple way to explore by genre and decade. The app pushes podcasts and the same top charts instead.
author: user_q7r8s9t0

text: Recommendations improved after I cleaned my liked songs, but new users must struggle because the app needs tons of data before it suggests anything good.
author: user_u1v2w3x4

text: I keep hearing the same songs on repeat in Daily Mix. Comfort listening is fine but I also want a dedicated discovery mode that never plays artists already in my library.
author: user_y5z6a7b8

text: Frustrated that shuffle and radio keep looping the same tracks. I am trying to find workout music I have never heard but the app keeps recycling hits.
author: user_c9d0e1f2

text: Release Radar is the only feature that consistently helps me discover new music from artists I follow. Everything else feels generic.
author: user_g3h4i5j6

text: Different family members on the same account get completely different recommendation quality. My teen discovers tons of music while I get stale playlists.
author: user_k7l8m9n0
